name: gipc.dev — self-hosted operator platform
blurb: Live-demo platform on bare-metal k3s behind a Cloudflare Tunnel (zero inbound ports), infrastructure-as-code in-repo; migrated the full domain + mail estate solo.

name: Nina Nails — booking platform (client)
blurb: Full-stack Next.js 15 / React 19 / Supabase product on Vercel (~15k LOC) with a three-tier test suite (Vitest, Playwright e2e, axe) and Google Calendar + email integration.

name: Seismic inversion (PyTorch U-Net)
blurb: Reproducible U-Net (12.5M parameters) inverting 2,000 synthetic seismograms via a differentiable wave simulation; functional-core design, 27 deterministic tests.

name: Transformer financial-prediction platform
blurb: Node.js + Python orchestration to Azure Kubernetes; ETL over 3M+ records/day, sub-200 ms per query, ~12% MAE reduction, IaC (Bicep/Terraform), >90% coverage.

name: Real-time drowning detection (Griffith × Huizhou)
blurb: Edge computer-vision on Raspberry Pi/ARM at >=20 fps and 95%+ accuracy, with sub-100 ms multi-sensor fusion; published in IEEE Access.
